LiquidationExplanationStmt.ExplanationTxt: GREEN UMBRELLA CORPORATION TERMINATED IN 2020. ALL ASSETS WERE DISTRIBUTED IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE ORGANIZATION DOCUMENTS (SEE ATTACHED). INVESTMENT ACCOUNT WAS CLOSED IN NOVEMBER OF 2020.
